ModMetaData.name: Dynamic Diplomacy + Geological Landforms Compatibility
ModMetaData.description:
Compatibility patch for Dynamic Diplomacy (Continued) and Geological Landforms.
Problem: Dynamic Diplomacy generates battle simulation maps at random world tiles. If Geological Landforms applies an extreme mountain landform (cliffs, impassable mountains, etc.) to that tile, NPC pawns cannot path across the map properly and battles fail to resolve.
Fix: This patch adds a Harmony postfix to DD's tile selection that rejects tiles with: - Impassable hilliness (vanilla mountain tiles) - Extreme cliff topology from Geological Landforms (CliffAllSides, CliffValley, CliffThreeSides) - Cave/underground topology (CaveEntrance, CaveTunnel)
If the selected tile is problematic, the patch retries with a fallback tile selection or returns invalid to skip the event.
Requires: Dynamic Diplomacy - Continued AND Geological Landforms No effect if either mod is missing.
